goal: Stop the bot from replying to its own audio. Word-set echo guard was insufficient — Deepgram occasionally hallucinates a novel word from speaker echo + breath + room noise, which slipped the heuristic and the bot entered a Crosstalk cycle on its own voice. Replace the heuristic with a hard time gate: during TTS playback AND for POST_TTS_COOLDOWN_S (default 0.6s) afterward, is_final events are dropped before reaching Crosstalk. Barge-in opens the gate immediately so the user's intentional interruption is still captured. The word-set echo check stays on the partial→barge path so the bot doesn't cut itself off via barge.
